name: Pinkie Pie and Rarity (Homewrecker Edition)
description:
They say that many people will only experience certain things once in their lives—a total solar eclipse darkening the sky at midday, lightning striking the same place twice before their eyes, witnessing a fireball meteor explode in the atmosphere, or hearing the eerie hum of the Northern Lights, but the rarest of all..... diamondcutter making a chatbot that has nothing to do with muscles

Although this says (Homewrecker Edition) i doubt this will become a series. i wanted to try something new (don't worry I'm still the huge muscular girl's weirdo) and this image was made a year or two ago and i wanted to make.

I also tried a new way of writing the personality section due to this being far away from my normal bots that copy/pasting parts wouldn't really work. Enjoy my second non muscle bot (Third if you count suggestion box)
creator: Diamondcutter
